creator: vess@btc.net
text:
A samall X11 tolls alowed switch between
latin-ENG/Cyrillic-BDS/Cyrillic-PHO keyboard layout.
There are a specefic BULGARIAN keyboard layouts.
Accepted koi8 and cp1251 enconing.



#This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#	xcyrBGR/Makefile
#	xcyrBGR/distinfo
#	xcyrBGR/pkg-comment
#	xcyrBGR/pkg-descr
#	xcyrBGR/pkg-plist
echo c - xcyrBGR 
mkdir -p xcyrBGR > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xcyrBGR/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xcyrBGR/Makefile << 'END-of-xcyrBGR/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for: xcyrBGR
X# Date created:		18 Feb 2001
X# Whom:			vess /Veselin Slavov/ <vess@btc.net>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	xcyrBGR
XPORTVERSION=	1.0
XCATEGORIES=	russian
XMASTER_SITES=   ftp://aladdin.cblink.net/pub/FreeBSD/X11/cyrillic/
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	vess@btc.net
X
XUSE_XPM=	yes
XNO_INSTALL_MANPAGES=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X.if ${OSVERSION} >= 400012
XMAKE_ENV=	COPT="-fpermissive"
X.endif
X
Xpost-extract:
X	@ ${MV} ${WRKSRC}/makefile ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X
Xdo-install:
X	@ ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/xcyrBGR ${PREFIX}/bin/xcyrBGR
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-xcyrBGR/Makefile
echo x - xcyrBGR/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >xcyrBGR/distinfo << 'END-of-xcyrBGR/distinfo'
XMD5 (xcyrBGR-1.0.tar.gz) = 6bd0a7d88dda05cddedcc907ae6c3987
END-of-xcyrBGR/distinfo
echo x - xcyrBGR/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >xcyrBGR/pkg-comment << 'END-of-xcyrBGR/pkg-comment'
XThe bulgarian cyrillic keyboard layout manager for X11
END-of-xcyrBGR/pkg-comment
echo x - xcyrBGR/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >xcyrBGR/pkg-descr<< 'END-of-xcyrBGR/pkg-descr'
XxcyrBGR - The Bulgarian Cyrillic keyboard layout manager for X11 
X
XEasy toggle leyaut <English/Cyrillic-BDS/Cyrillic-PHOnetic> 
XMouse click to toggle encoding (Win-CP1251/KOI8).
X
XCyrillic fonts for X11 (koi8 and cp1251):
Xftp://aladdin.cblink.net/pub/FreeBSD/X11/X_cyr_fonts_koi_cp1251.tar.gz 
X
XVeselin Slavov - vess 
Xvess@btc.net
END-of-xcyrBGR/pkg-descr
echo x - xcyrBGR/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >xcyrBGR/pkg-plist<< 'END-of-xcyrBGR/pkg-plist'
Xbin/xcyrBGR
END-of-xcyrBGR/pkg-plist
